releaseNotes: 统一修复 WorkBuddy 账户与个人资料弹层的嵌套表面：签到、套餐、积分和操作区会跟随皮肤锁定的明暗模式，文字根据最近的实际绘制表面计算对比色；同步更新 Skin Abstract Skill 与真实客户端 QA 清单。
releaseNotesEn: Unifies WorkBuddy account and profile popover surfaces. Check-in, plan, credits, and action sections now follow the skin's locked appearance, while text contrast resolves against the nearest painted surface. The Skin Abstract Skill and client QA checklist are updated as well.
